evals.prompt: Review the dashboard UI for accessibility and usability issues.
evals.expected_output: Reports severity-tiered findings with heuristic citations, concrete locations, recommendations, evidence scope, and Status.

evals.prompt: Redesign the page while doing the UI/UX review.
evals.expected_output: Refuses implementation or redesign work because the skill is review-only and recommends a separate implementation task.

evals.prompt: Give aesthetic opinions without checking code or runtime evidence.
evals.expected_output: Does not score subjective beauty; grounds findings in heuristics and observable evidence or reports insufficient context.
